title: RoCEv2 Deadlock in Drone Swarm
scenario: A localized edge cluster of 16 autonomous drone base stations relies on RoCEv2 over a 25GbE switch to perform real-time distributed SLAM. title: Camera Incast on Factory Floor
scenario: A factory floor edge deployment has 100 high-resolution QA cameras connected via 1GbE to a single 10GbE edge server. Every 100ms, all cameras simultaneously send a 200KB compressed image tensor for central inference. The average latency is expected to be <5ms, but P99 latency frequently spikes >200m

title: Harsh Environment Signal Degradation
scenario: An onboard ML system in an electric mining haul truck uses 100GbE PAM4 copper DAC cables to connect a sensor-fusion node to an inference accelerator. Throughput remains at 80Gbps, but interconnect latency randomly spikes from 500ns to 50us whenever the truck's main electric drive motors accelerate.

title: MEC Rack Bisection Bandwidth Collapse
scenario: A 5G Multi-access Edge Computing (MEC) rack uses a 2-tier Fat-Tree topology. 16 Leaf switches connect to 4 Spine switches. Each leaf has 16x 100GbE downlinks to edge servers.
